title: Kirby Fighters a PvP pack
description: This changes the texture of diamond and nethrite armor puss swords and axe into a Kirby-looking version of it enjoy!
body:
Do you want to become a Kirby, well you're in luck this pack changes nethrite, and diamond weapons and armor to a Kriby theme texture making you feel like a Kirby with that armor and weapons.

Note: this is my first-ever PvP pack so It may not be the greatest of all times and the sword should be smaller.
